scripts.build: tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.linux.conf.json --bundles deb rpm appimage
scripts.build:linux: tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.linux.conf.json --bundles deb rpm appimage
scripts.build:linux:x64: tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.linux.conf.json --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles deb rpm appimage
scripts.build:linux:arm64: tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.linux.conf.json --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles deb rpm appimage
